abstract.text: Interface for intercepting and modifying HttpService function calls.
The interval for active location updates
Location permissions granted by user to the app.
Record which contains data received in HTTP response.
Enum which describes possible error types which could happen during HTTP request/download calls.
Describes the reason for a tile region download request failure.
HttpRequest holds basic information for construction of an HTTP request
Describes the tiles data domain.
Platform independent settings service. Settings service is a key/value storage (persistent or non
persistent), that also allows to register observers to get notifications when values are updated.
Observer for getting updates from a LocationProvider.
Contains either an HttpRequest or an HttpResponse.
These constants can be used as keys for TileStore::setOption to configure further aspects of a TileStore instance.
Class for Mapbox SDK settings management
Allows to cancel the associated asynchronous operation
Record which is used to report HTTP response to the caller.
TileRegion represents an identifiable geographic tile region with metadata
Enum that contains possible storage types that can be used for settings service.
Observers for getting updates from LocationService.
State level of a log message.
Continuation to be invoked once the interceptor is done processing a request. If invoked with a HttpRequest, the
HTTP service will proceed to make a request via the network. Invoking the continuation with a HttpResponse bypasses
the network and causes the request to complete immediately with the specified response.
Callback which is used to report result of HTTP request.
Structure for keeping an information about errors that can happen when using Settings service
Describes a tile region load request error.
Factory that allows to create settings service instance.
Describes a cache clearing error.
Record which contains detailed information about HTTP error happened during request/download call.
Data model that contains parameters for location requests.
HTTP service factory.
Error code with brief explanation.
TileStore manages downloads and storage for requests to tile-related API endpoints, enforcing a disk usage
quota: tiles available on disk may be deleted to make room for a new download. This interface can be used by an
app developer to set the disk quota. The rest of TileStore API is intended for native SDK consumption only.
Keys for additional information (extra) in Location.
Accuracy authorization granted by user to the app.
Describes the reason for a cache clearing failure.
Provides information about a given Mapbox SDK. This information is then used to populate the “User-Agent” HTTP header
of HTTP requests generated from within Mapbox SDKs. Mapbox SDKs include Maps, Navigation, Search, and others.
Location provider that provides locations
Boxed version of CLLocationCoordinate2D
Callback involved to get the location.
Class that allows to configure Mapbox SDKs logging per application.
Location service factory.
Location provider specialisation that provides real-time locations generated from the device
Callback Invoked to report the progess of the tile region loading operation.
A tile region’s load progress includes counts
of the number of resources that have completed downloading
and the total number of resources that are required.
HTTP defines a set of request methods to indicate the desired action to be performed for a given resource.
Interface for implementing log writing backends, e.g. for using platform specific log backends or logging to a notification service.
The result of tile region estim
Set of common keys that can be used to configure all Mapbox SDKs.
Classify network types based on cost.
Continuation to be invoked once the interceptor is done processing a request’s response.
A tile region’s estimate progress includes counts of the number of resources that have
been estimated and the total number of resources as well as a partial result with the
current estimate, calculated using the data available at the moment.
Describes the tile region load option values.
Holds options for the tile region estimation operation.
The accuracy of the observed location
Location information.
Callback for the HTTP request cancelled event.
Provides an interface to query registered Mapbox SDKs. Mapbox SDKs include Maps, Navigation, Search, and others.
A bundle that encapsulates tilesets creation for the tile store implementation.
Codes of location errors.
Interactive, thoroughly customizable maps for iOS powered by vector tiles and Metal.
Instance that allows connecting or disconnecting the Mapbox stack to the network.
